channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Guardians of Zimbabwe: Ex-Soldiers Launch New Political Party And Challenge Mnangagwa’s term Extension @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: HARARE – The launch of the new party is widely interpreted as a direct consequence of the deepening succession crisis within Zanu PF. The ruling party is reportedly locked in a bitter struggle between factions aligned with President Mnangagwa and Vice-President Constantino Chiwenga. Retired soldiers, many of whom played a pivotal role in the country’s [...] The post Guardians of Zimbabwe: Ex-Soldiers Launch New Political Party And Challenge Mnangagwa’s term Extension first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Former MP Challenges Nation To Reject CAB3
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| Former Cowdray Park MP Pashor Raphael Sibanda has challenged Zimbabweans to reject the controversial Constitution Amendment Bill No.... Continue reading "Former MP Challenges Nation To Reject CAB3" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zanu PF rush to force a Mnangagwa ’third term’ @bulawayo24 @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: The Senate on Tuesday held a lengthy and often heated debate on the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment Bill No. 3 (CAB3), with ruling party senators and traditional leaders strongly backing the propos... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Chivayo CAB 3 ’bribes’ backfire @bulawayo24
item.description: A war veteran has filed an urgent High Court application seeking to stop the processing of the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment Bill No. 3 (CAB3), arguing that Parliament’s approval of the controver... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Ex-soldiers launch party to challenge Mnangagwa term extension @bulawayo24
item.description: A group of retired and former serving members of Zimbabwe’s security services has launched a new political party, pledging to restore discipline, accountability and constitutional governance while cri... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Africa’s silent menstrual health crisis @bulawayo24
item.description: Women and girls across Africa continue to face undiagnosed menstrual health disorders, limited access to specialised healthcare and persistent social stigma, prompting organisers of this year’s Women’... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Chiwenga makes fresh cryptic remarks on CAB3 @bulawayo24
item.description: Vice-President Constantino Chiwenga has made another cryptic public statement widely interpreted as a critique of the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment Bill No. 3 (CAB3), using the biblical story of... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: We Care for You, Mnangagwa Tells Zimbabweans Returning Home from SA

item.title: Bulawayo identifies 7 corridors to revive industry @bulawayo24
item.description: The Zimbabwe National Chamber of Commerce (ZNCC) has identified seven underutilised industrial and economic growth corridors around Bulawayo, saying their development could restore the city’s position... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Manwa bounces back as ZIFA CEO @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe Football Association (ZIFA) has reappointed Yvonne Mapika Manwa as its substantive General Secretary, marking her return to the association seven months after the end of her previous tenure.T... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Government Warns Public Service Vehicle Operators Against Carrying Fuel and Explosives
item.description: Government Warns Public Service Vehicle Operators Against Carrying Fuel and Explosives After Deadly Gweru Tragedy The Government has issued a stern warning to public service vehicle (PSV) operators against transporting fuel, explosives, hazardous chemicals and other dangerous substances alongside passengers, saying those who violate the law will face prosecution. The Ministry of Transport and Infrastructural [...] The post Government Warns Public Service Vehicle Operators Against Carrying Fuel and Explosives appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: SDA Evangelist Marufu Walks Free As Prosecutors Challenge Police To Prove Facebook Post Ownership
item.description: Zimbabwe Police Told To Prove Facebook Post Ownership In SDA Evangelist Case The legal proceedings against Seventh Day Adventist Evangelist Sam Marufu have hit a significant roadblock, with prosecutors demanding concrete evidence linking him to the social media posts at the centre of the dispute. He has walked free from court proceedings as authorities currently [...] The post SDA Evangelist Marufu Walks Free As Prosecutors Challenge Police To Prove Facebook Post Ownership appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Farai Jere blasts CAPS legends over Magalane backing as club unveil four new signings @nehandaradio
item.description: Farai Jere has hit out at CAPS United legends for supporting Wallace Magalane as the club unveils four new signings and reinforces its Premier Soccer League title ambitions. The post Farai Jere blasts CAPS legends over Magalane backing as club unveil four new signings appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: ZC announces men’s technical team appointments, selection panel @3menonaboat
item.description:
The ZC Board endorsed recommendations from its Cricket Committee, chaired by Mr Blessing Ngondo, confirming the senior men’s coaching and support staff, the Zimbabwe Under-19 Men’s technical team and the national selection panels.

The post ZC announces men’s technical team appointments, selection panel first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: ZWPSL confirms Matchday 11 as Herentals seek to maintain unbeaten run
item.description: Zimbabwe Women’s Premier Soccer League (ZWPSL) enter Matchday 11 with seven exciting fixtures expected across the country. Defending champions, Herentals are the only side yet to taste defeat this season, boasting 21 points from six wins and three draws. They trail behind log leaders Chapungu Queens by a single point, with the Air Force side [...] The post ZWPSL confirms Matchday 11 as Herentals seek to maintain unbeaten run appeared first on Soccer24. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Soccer24

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
